questionHtml: A black body is on the Moon’s surface at point A. Show that the maximum temperature that this body can reach is 400 K. Assume that the Earth and the Moon are the same distance from the Sun.
markschemeHtml:
T = ( 1360 σ ) 0.25   ✔

390 «K» ✔

Must see 1360 (from data booklet) used for MP1.

Must see at least 2 s.f.
